Analytics functionality, syscalls, event logging, data collection, heartbeat metrics, and storage management.


## Files
- **[analytics.c](analytics.c.md)**: Implements analytics functionality, including metrics management and stopwatch operations.
- **[analytics_data_syscalls.c](analytics_data_syscalls.c.md)**: Defines syscalls for analytics operations like setting metrics, incrementing values, and logging events.
- **[analytics_event.c](analytics_event.c.md)**: Functions for logging various analytics events related to app launches, memory, Bluetooth, and health insights.
- **[analytics_external.c](analytics_external.c.md)**: Collects and updates various system and application analytics data for the Pebble firmware.
- **[analytics_heartbeat.c](analytics_heartbeat.c.md)**: Implements functions for creating, setting, and retrieving analytics heartbeat metrics in firmware.
- **[analytics_logging.c](analytics_logging.c.md)**: Implements analytics logging for device and app heartbeats, including event logging and session management.
- **[analytics_metric.c](analytics_metric.c.md)**: Implements functions and data structures for managing analytics metrics in firmware.
- **[analytics_storage.c](analytics_storage.c.md)**: Manages analytics storage with functions for initialization, locking, and heartbeat retrieval.
